samples.text: All birds are animals. A sparrow is a bird. Therefore, is a sparrow an animal?
Every bird belongs to the animal kingdom. A sparrow is classified as a bird. Does this mean a sparrow is an animal?
All avians are animals. A sparrow is an avian. Therefore, is a sparrow an animal?
A sparrow belongs to the category of birds. Birds are animals. Based on this information, is a sparrow an animal?
All birds are animals. A sparrow is a bird. The weather today is cloudy. Therefore, is a sparrow an animal?
